creator: rkitover@gmail.com
text:
Hello, when I try to boot the latest current image on my AMD Epyc system, I get this panic message on boot:

"cannot find a large enough size"

My specs:

Super Micro H11DSi motherboard:

https://www.supermicro.com/en/products/motherboard/H11DSi

Dual AMD Epyc 7601 32 core processors @ 2.20GHz base frequency.

128 GB of ECC RAM, 4x 32GB.
